entries.rationale_summary: Pullback in strong uptrend. Close (22.59) > SMA50 (20.14) > SMA200 (18.84). 1.5% drawdown from 20d high (22.94) indicates healthy pullback. Positive SMA50 slope, volume declining (0.86 ratio). Excellent liquidity (£161.3M avg). Risk-reward 1.09 GBP stop distance. Gap risk buffer applied (10%). Industrials sector adds diversification.
